# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app
Movie Fox curates 100+ blockbusters, acclaimed series, and hidden gems. Browse by genre — Action, Sci-Fi, Drama, Thriller and more. Watch trailers, save favorites, and discover your next obsession.

### Platform Features
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/platform-features
Explore everything Movie Fox offers: polished trailer previews, star ratings, personal watchlists, genre-driven discovery, and an immersive cinematic browsing experience — all in one platform.

### Library
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/library
Browse Movie Fox's full catalog of 100+ hand-picked titles. Filter by genre — Action, Drama, Sci-Fi, Horror, Thriller, Comedy, Fantasy and Crime. Find your next favorite film tonight.

### About
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/about
Learn about Movie Fox — the team behind the platform, our mission to make cinematic discovery effortless, and our vision for the future of curated streaming entertainment.

### Contact
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/contact
Get in touch with the Movie Fox team. Reach out for support, feedback, partnership inquiries, or general questions. We're here to help you get the most out of your cinema experience.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
